description: Projects a 3D point onto a plane (finds the foot of perpendicular)
utility: Calculate the closest point on a plane to a given point

alternates.description: Project a point onto a plane without rendering the projected point visually. Useful when the result is used as input for other expressions.

examples.expression: P = plane3d(g, 0, 0, 1, 0); A = point3d(g, 3, 4, 5); project3d(P, A)
P = plane3d(g, 1, 1, 1, 0); A = point3d(g, 2, 2, 2); project3d(P, A)

examples.scenario: Project spherical point onto xy-plane (for azimuthal angle)
examples.expression:
P = point3d(G, r, theta, phi, type(spherical))
xyPlane = plane3d(G, "z = 0", type(cartesian), defer())
pProj = project3d(xyPlane, P, defer())
